features.name: Interactive Email Actions in Deal Copilot Chat
features.description: Transform passive email drafts into actionable emails with inline editing, send now, schedule, and one-click task creation.

stories.title: Add inline edit mode to EmailResponse
acceptance: Edit button (Lucide Pencil) appears in quick-actions row next to Copy and Gmail buttons
Clicking Edit toggles subject to <input> and body to <textarea> with min-h-[200px]
Done button (Lucide Check) saves edits to emailSubject/emailBody state; Cancel (Lucide X) reverts to snapshot
Snapshot saved via useRef on edit entry for reliable revert

stories.title: Add Send Now button with email-send-as-rep integration
acceptance: Send Now primary button (Lucide Send, violet bg) appears below email preview
Calls supabase.functions.invoke('email-send-as-rep', { body: { to, subject, body } }) on click
Success: toast + transition to sent state (Lucide CheckCircle, disabled button)
Error: toast.error with error message
Auto-creates follow-up task (3 business days) on success using getNextBusinessDay helper

stories.title: Add schedule quick-pick buttons with scheduled_emails insert
acceptance: 2-3 suggested time chips rendered under Schedule label (Lucide Clock): next business day 9am, +2 days 10am, AI sendTime if present
Clicking a chip inserts row into scheduled_emails table with correct scheduled_for timestamp
Confirmation state shows 'Scheduled for Tue 9am' with cancel link
Cancel link deletes the scheduled_emails row and reverts UI

stories.title: Create scheduled_emails table migration with pg_cron job
acceptance: scheduled_emails table created with: id, user_id, to_email, cc_email, bcc_email, subject, body, scheduled_for, status (pending/sent/failed/cancelled), error_message, sent_at, contact_id, deal_id, thread_id, reply_to_message_id, created_at
RLS: users CRUD own rows, service_role full access
pg_cron job process_scheduled_emails runs every minute, calls email-send-as-rep via net.http_post

stories.title: Fix send-scheduled-emails edge function to use email-send-as-rep
acceptance: Replaced legacy user_integrations + manual Gmail OAuth with supabase.functions.invoke('email-send-as-rep')
Pinned @supabase/supabase-js@2.43.4
Replaced legacy corsHeaders with getCorsHeaders(req) from _shared/corsHelper.ts
Function reads from scheduled_emails table and delegates send to email-send-as-rep

stories.title: Add one-click Create Follow-Up Task button
acceptance: Create follow-up task secondary button (Lucide ListTodo) appears below schedule section
Inserts to tasks table: title, description, task_type='follow_up', status='pending', priority='medium', due_date=+3 business days, assigned_to=current user
taskCreated state transitions button to confirmation display (Lucide CheckCircle)
getNextBusinessDay() extracted as inline helper (shared with Send Now auto-task)

stories.title: Clean up emojis and wire suggestion action types
acceptance: Replace ⚠ emoji in context warnings with Lucide AlertTriangle icon
EmailSuggestion.action type extended with 'create_task' | 'schedule_send' | 'send_now'
handleSuggestionClick wired to call new handlers for the new action types

parallelGroups.name: Group 1: Foundation (no dependencies)
parallelGroups.note: Inline edit, DB migration, and type cleanup can all run in parallel

parallelGroups.name: Group 2: Send + Backend (depends on Group 1)
parallelGroups.note: Send Now depends on edit mode; edge function fix depends on migration

parallelGroups.name: Group 3: Schedule + Tasks (depends on Groups 1+2)
parallelGroups.note: Schedule depends on migration + edit; tasks depend on edit mode
